result.stdout:
Automagically update NuGet packages in .NET projects. 0.35.0

Usage: NuKeeper [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  global        Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all
                repositories the provided token can access.
  inspect       Checks projects existing locally for possible updates.
  org           Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all
                repositories in a github organisation or an Azure DevOps
                project.
  repo          Performs version checks and generates pull requests for a single
                repository.
  update        Applies relevant updates to a local project.

Run 'NuKeeper [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Automagically update NuGet packages in .NET projects. 0.35.0

Usage: NuKeeper [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  global        Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all
                repositories the provided token can access.
  inspect       Checks projects existing locally for possible updates.
  org           Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all
                repositories in a github organisation or an Azure DevOps
                project.
  repo          Performs version checks and generates pull requests for a single
                repository.
  update        Applies relevant updates to a local project.

Run 'NuKeeper [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all repositories the provided token can access.

Usage: NuKeeper global [options] <Token>

Arguments:
  Token                                                    Personal access token
                                                           to authorise access
                                                           to server.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                             Show help
                                                           information.
  --includerepos <INCLUDE_REPOS>                           Only consider
                                                           repositories matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  --excluderepos <EXCLUDE_REPOS>                           Do not consider
                                                           repositories matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  --maxrepo <MAX_REPOSITORIES_CHANGED>                     The maximum number of
                                                           repositories to
                                                           change. Defaults to
                                                           10.
  -f|--fork <FORK_MODE>                                    Prefer to make
                                                           branches on a fork of
                                                           the writer
                                                           repository, or on
                                                           that repository
                                                           itself. Allowed
                                                           values are
                                                           PreferFork,
                                                           PreferSingleRepository,
                                                           SingleRepositoryOnly.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           PreferFork,
                                                           PreferSingleRepository,
                                                           SingleRepositoryOnly.
  -m|--maxpackageupdates <MAX_PACKAGE_UPDATES>             The maximum number of
                                                           package updates to
                                                           apply on one
                                                           repository. Defaults
                                                           to 3.
  --maxopenpullrequests <MAX_OPEN_PULL_REQUESTS>           The maximum number of
                                                           open pull requests
                                                           for one repository.
                                                           Defaults to 1 if
                                                           `--consolidate` is
                                                           specified, otherwise
                                                           defaults to
                                                           `--maxpackageupdates`.
  -n|--consolidate                                         Consolidate updates
                                                           into a single pull
                                                           request. Defaults to
                                                           false.
  -l|--label <LABEL>                                       Label to apply to
                                                           GitHub pull requests.
                                                           Defaults to
                                                           'nukeeper'. Multiple
                                                           labels can be
                                                           provided by
                                                           specifying this
                                                           option multiple
                                                           times.
  -g|--api <API_ENDPOINT>                                  Api Base Url. If you
                                                           are using an internal
                                                           server and not a
                                                           public one, you must
                                                           set it to the api url
                                                           of your server.
  --platform <PLATFORM>                                    Sets the
                                                           collaboration
                                                           platform type. By
                                                           default this is
                                                           inferred from the
                                                           Url.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           GitHub, AzureDevOps,
                                                           Bitbucket,
                                                           BitbucketLocal,
                                                           GitLab, Gitea.
  -d|--deletebranchaftermerge <DELETE_BRANCH_AFTER_MERGE>  Deletes branch
                                                           created by NuKeeper
                                                           after merge. Defaults
                                                           to true.
  -c|--change <ALLOWED_CHANGE>                             Allowed version
                                                           change: Patch, Minor,
                                                           Major. Defaults to
                                                           Major.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           None, Patch, Minor,
                                                           Major.
  --useprerelease <USE_PRERELEASE>                         Allowed prerelease:
                                                           Always, Never,
                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Defaults to
                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Always, Never,
                                                           FromPrerelease.
  -s|--source <SOURCE>                                     Specifies a NuGet
                                                           package source to use
                                                           during the operation.
                                                           This setting
                                                           overrides all of the
                                                           sources specified in
                                                           the NuGet.config
                                                           files. Multiple
                                                           sources can be
                                                           provided by
                                                           specifying this
                                                           option multiple
                                                           times.
  -a|--age <MINIMUM_PACKAGE_AGE>                           Exclude updates that
                                                           do not meet a minimum
                                                           age, in order to not
                                                           consume packages
                                                           immediately after
                                                           they are released.
                                                           Examples: 0 = zero,
                                                           12h = 12 hours, 3d =
                                                           3 days, 2w = two
                                                           weeks. The default is
                                                           7 days.
  -i|--include <INCLUDE>                                   Only consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -e|--exclude <EXCLUDE>                                   Do not consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -v|--verbosity <VERBOSITY>                               Sets the verbosity
                                                           level of the command.
                                                           Allowed values are
                                                           q[uiet], m[inimal],
                                                           n[ormal], d[etailed].
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Quiet, Q, Minimal, M,
                                                           Normal, N, Detailed,
                                                           D.
  --logdestination <LOG_DESTINATION>                       Destination for
                                                           logging.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --logfile <LOG_FILE>                                     Log to the named
                                                           file.
  --outputformat <OUTPUT_FORMAT>                           Format for output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Off, Text, Csv,
                                                           Metrics, LibYears.
  --outputdestination <OUTPUT_DESTINATION>                 Destination for
                                                           output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --outputfile <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>                          File name for output.
  --branchnametemplate <BRANCH_NAME_TEMPLATE>              Template used for
                                                           creating the branch
                                                           name.
  -git|--gitclipath <GIT_CLI_PATH>                         Path to git to use
                                                           instead of
                                                           lib2gitsharp
                                                           implementation

commands.payload:
Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all repositories the provided token can access.

Usage: NuKeeper global [options] <Token>

Arguments:
  Token                                                    Personal access token
                                                           to authorise access
                                                           to server.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                             Show help
                                                           information.
  --includerepos <INCLUDE_REPOS>                           Only consider
                                                           repositories matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  --excluderepos <EXCLUDE_REPOS>                           Do not consider
                                                           repositories matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  --maxrepo <MAX_REPOSITORIES_CHANGED>                     The maximum number of
                                                           repositories to
                                                           change. Defaults to
                                                           10.
  -f|--fork <FORK_MODE>                                    Prefer to make
                                                           branches on a fork of
                                                           the writer
                                                           repository, or on
                                                           that repository
                                                           itself. Allowed
                                                           values are
                                                           PreferFork,
                                                           PreferSingleRepository,
                                                           SingleRepositoryOnly.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           PreferFork,
                                                           PreferSingleRepository,
                                                           SingleRepositoryOnly.
  -m|--maxpackageupdates <MAX_PACKAGE_UPDATES>             The maximum number of
                                                           package updates to
                                                           apply on one
                                                           repository. Defaults
                                                           to 3.
  --maxopenpullrequests <MAX_OPEN_PULL_REQUESTS>           The maximum number of
                                                           open pull requests
                                                           for one repository.
                                                           Defaults to 1 if
                                                           `--consolidate` is
                                                           specified, otherwise
                                                           defaults to
                                                           `--maxpackageupdates`.
  -n|--consolidate                                         Consolidate updates
                                                           into a single pull
                                                           request. Defaults to
                                                           false.
  -l|--label <LABEL>                                       Label to apply to
                                                           GitHub pull requests.
                                                           Defaults to
                                                           'nukeeper'. Multiple
                                                           labels can be
                                                           provided by
                                                           specifying this
                                                           option multiple
                                                           times.
  -g|--api <API_ENDPOINT>                                  Api Base Url. If you
                                                           are using an internal
                                                           server and not a
                                                           public one, you must
                                                           set it to the api url
                                                           of your server.
  --platform <PLATFORM>                                    Sets the
                                                           collaboration
                                                           platform type. By
                                                           default this is
                                                           inferred from the
                                                           Url.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           GitHub, AzureDevOps,
                                                           Bitbucket,
                                                           BitbucketLocal,
                                                           GitLab, Gitea.
  -d|--deletebranchaftermerge <DELETE_BRANCH_AFTER_MERGE>  Deletes branch
                                                           created by NuKeeper
                                                           after merge. Defaults
                                                           to true.
  -c|--change <ALLOWED_CHANGE>                             Allowed version
                                                           change: Patch, Minor,
                                                           Major. Defaults to
                                                           Major.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           None, Patch, Minor,
                                                           Major.
  --useprerelease <USE_PRERELEASE>                         Allowed prerelease:
                                                           Always, Never,
                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Defaults to
                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Always, Never,
                                                           FromPrerelease.
  -s|--source <SOURCE>                                     Specifies a NuGet
                                                           package source to use
                                                           during the operation.
                                                           This setting
                                                           overrides all of the
                                                           sources specified in
                                                           the NuGet.config
                                                           files. Multiple
                                                           sources can be
                                                           provided by
                                                           specifying this
                                                           option multiple
                                                           times.
  -a|--age <MINIMUM_PACKAGE_AGE>                           Exclude updates that
                                                           do not meet a minimum
                                                           age, in order to not
                                                           consume packages
                                                           immediately after
                                                           they are released.
                                                           Examples: 0 = zero,
                                                           12h = 12 hours, 3d =
                                                           3 days, 2w = two
                                                           weeks. The default is
                                                           7 days.
  -i|--include <INCLUDE>                                   Only consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -e|--exclude <EXCLUDE>                                   Do not consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -v|--verbosity <VERBOSITY>                               Sets the verbosity
                                                           level of the command.
                                                           Allowed values are
                                                           q[uiet], m[inimal],
                                                           n[ormal], d[etailed].
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Quiet, Q, Minimal, M,
                                                           Normal, N, Detailed,
                                                           D.
  --logdestination <LOG_DESTINATION>                       Destination for
                                                           logging.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --logfile <LOG_FILE>                                     Log to the named
                                                           file.
  --outputformat <OUTPUT_FORMAT>                           Format for output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Off, Text, Csv,
                                                           Metrics, LibYears.
  --outputdestination <OUTPUT_DESTINATION>                 Destination for
                                                           output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --outputfile <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>                          File name for output.
  --branchnametemplate <BRANCH_NAME_TEMPLATE>              Template used for
                                                           creating the branch
                                                           name.
  -git|--gitclipath <GIT_CLI_PATH>                         Path to git to use
                                                           instead of
                                                           lib2gitsharp
                                                           implementation

result.stdout:
Checks projects existing locally for possible updates.

Usage: NuKeeper inspect [options] <Path>

Arguments:
  Path                                         The path to a .sln or project
                                               file, or to a directory
                                               containing a .NET
                                               solution/project. If none is
                                               specified, the current directory
                                               will be used.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                 Show help information.
  -c|--change <ALLOWED_CHANGE>                 Allowed version change: Patch,
                                               Minor, Major. Defaults to Major.
                                               Allowed values are: None, Patch,
                                               Minor, Major.
  --useprerelease <USE_PRERELEASE>             Allowed prerelease: Always,
                                               Never, FromPrerelease. Defaults
                                               to FromPrerelease.
                                               Allowed values are: Always,
                                               Never, FromPrerelease.
  -s|--source <SOURCE>                         Specifies a NuGet package source
                                               to use during the operation. This
                                               setting overrides all of the
                                               sources specified in the
                                               NuGet.config files. Multiple
                                               sources can be provided by
                                               specifying this option multiple
                                               times.
  -a|--age <MINIMUM_PACKAGE_AGE>               Exclude updates that do not meet
                                               a minimum age, in order to not
                                               consume packages immediately
                                               after they are released.
                                               Examples: 0 = zero, 12h = 12
                                               hours, 3d = 3 days, 2w = two
                                               weeks. The default is 7 days.
  -i|--include <INCLUDE>                       Only consider packages matching
                                               this regex pattern.
  -e|--exclude <EXCLUDE>                       Do not consider packages matching
                                               this regex pattern.
  -v|--verbosity <VERBOSITY>                   Sets the verbosity level of the
                                               command. Allowed values are
                                               q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal],
                                               d[etailed].
                                               Allowed values are: Quiet, Q,
                                               Minimal, M, Normal, N, Detailed,
                                               D.
  --logdestination <LOG_DESTINATION>           Destination for logging.
                                               Allowed values are: Console,
                                               File, Off.
  --logfile <LOG_FILE>                         Log to the named file.
  --outputformat <OUTPUT_FORMAT>               Format for output.
                                               Allowed values are: Off, Text,
                                               Csv, Metrics, LibYears.
  --outputdestination <OUTPUT_DESTINATION>     Destination for output.
                                               Allowed values are: Console,
                                               File, Off.
  --outputfile <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>              File name for output.
  --branchnametemplate <BRANCH_NAME_TEMPLATE>  Template used for creating the
                                               branch name.
  -git|--gitclipath <GIT_CLI_PATH>             Path to git to use instead of
                                               lib2gitsharp implementation

Checks projects existing locally for possible updates.

Usage: NuKeeper inspect [options] <Path>

Arguments:

result.stdout:
Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all repositories in a github organisation or an Azure DevOps project.

Usage: NuKeeper org [options] <Organisation name> <Token>

Arguments:
  Organisation name                                        The organisation to
                                                           scan.
  Token                                                    Personal access token
                                                           to authorise access
                                                           to server.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                             Show help
                                                           information.
  --includerepos <INCLUDE_REPOS>                           Only consider
                                                           repositories matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  --excluderepos <EXCLUDE_REPOS>                           Do not consider
                                                           repositories matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  --maxrepo <MAX_REPOSITORIES_CHANGED>                     The maximum number of
                                                           repositories to
                                                           change. Defaults to
                                                           10.
  -f|--fork <FORK_MODE>                                    Prefer to make
                                                           branches on a fork of
                                                           the writer
                                                           repository, or on
                                                           that repository
                                                           itself. Allowed
                                                           values are
                                                           PreferFork,
                                                           PreferSingleRepository,
                                                           SingleRepositoryOnly.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           PreferFork,
                                                           PreferSingleRepository,
                                                           SingleRepositoryOnly.
  -m|--maxpackageupdates <MAX_PACKAGE_UPDATES>             The maximum number of
                                                           package updates to
                                                           apply on one
                                                           repository. Defaults
                                                           to 3.
  --maxopenpullrequests <MAX_OPEN_PULL_REQUESTS>           The maximum number of
                                                           open pull requests
                                                           for one repository.
                                                           Defaults to 1 if
                                                           `--consolidate` is
                                                           specified, otherwise
                                                           defaults to
                                                           `--maxpackageupdates`.
  -n|--consolidate                                         Consolidate updates
                                                           into a single pull
                                                           request. Defaults to
                                                           false.
  -l|--label <LABEL>                                       Label to apply to
                                                           GitHub pull requests.
                                                           Defaults to
                                                           'nukeeper'. Multiple
                                                           labels can be
                                                           provided by
                                                           specifying this
                                                           option multiple
                                                           times.
  -g|--api <API_ENDPOINT>                                  Api Base Url. If you
                                                           are using an internal
                                                           server and not a
                                                           public one, you must
                                                           set it to the api url
                                                           of your server.
  --platform <PLATFORM>                                    Sets the
                                                           collaboration
                                                           platform type. By
                                                           default this is
                                                           inferred from the
                                                           Url.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           GitHub, AzureDevOps,
                                                           Bitbucket,
                                                           BitbucketLocal,
                                                           GitLab, Gitea.
  -d|--deletebranchaftermerge <DELETE_BRANCH_AFTER_MERGE>  Deletes branch
                                                           created by NuKeeper
                                                           after merge. Defaults
                                                           to true.
  -c|--change <ALLOWED_CHANGE>                             Allowed version
                                                           change: Patch, Minor,
                                                           Major. Defaults to
                                                           Major.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           None, Patch, Minor,
                                                           Major.
  --useprerelease <USE_PRERELEASE>                         Allowed prerelease:
                                                           Always, Never,
                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Defaults to
                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Always, Never,
                                                           FromPrerelease.
  -s|--source <SOURCE>                                     Specifies a NuGet
                                                           package source to use
                                                           during the operation.
                                                           This setting
                                                           overrides all of the
                                                           sources specified in
                                                           the NuGet.config
                                                           files. Multiple
                                                           sources can be
                                                           provided by
                                                           specifying this
                                                           option multiple
                                                           times.
  -a|--age <MINIMUM_PACKAGE_AGE>                           Exclude updates that
                                                           do not meet a minimum
                                                           age, in order to not
                                                           consume packages
                                                           immediately after
                                                           they are released.
                                                           Examples: 0 = zero,
                                                           12h = 12 hours, 3d =
                                                           3 days, 2w = two
                                                           weeks. The default is
                                                           7 days.
  -i|--include <INCLUDE>                                   Only consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -e|--exclude <EXCLUDE>                                   Do not consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -v|--verbosity <VERBOSITY>                               Sets the verbosity
                                                           level of the command.
                                                           Allowed values are
                                                           q[uiet], m[inimal],
                                                           n[ormal], d[etailed].
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Quiet, Q, Minimal, M,
                                                           Normal, N, Detailed,
                                                           D.
  --logdestination <LOG_DESTINATION>                       Destination for
                                                           logging.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --logfile <LOG_FILE>                                     Log to the named
                                                           file.
  --outputformat <OUTPUT_FORMAT>                           Format for output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Off, Text, Csv,
                                                           Metrics, LibYears.
  --outputdestination <OUTPUT_DESTINATION>                 Destination for
                                                           output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --outputfile <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>                          File name for output.
  --branchnametemplate <BRANCH_NAME_TEMPLATE>              Template used for
                                                           creating the branch
                                                           name.
  -git|--gitclipath <GIT_CLI_PATH>                         Path to git to use
                                                           instead of
                                                           lib2gitsharp
                                                           implementation

                                                           change: Patch, Minor,

  --useprerelease <USE_PRERELEASE>                         Allowed prerelease:

                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Defaults to
                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Always, Never,
                                                           FromPrerelease.
  -s|--source <SOURCE>                                     Specifies a NuGet
                                                           package source to use
                                                           during the operation.
                                                           This setting
                                                           overrides all of the
                                                           sources specified in
                                                           the NuGet.config
                                                           files. Multiple
                                                           sources can be
                                                           provided by
                                                           specifying this
                                                           option multiple
                                                           times.
  -a|--age <MINIMUM_PACKAGE_AGE>                           Exclude updates that
                                                           do not meet a minimum
                                                           age, in order to not
                                                           consume packages
                                                           immediately after
                                                           they are released.
                                                           Examples: 0 = zero,
                                                           12h = 12 hours, 3d =
                                                           3 days, 2w = two
                                                           weeks. The default is
                                                           7 days.
  -i|--include <INCLUDE>                                   Only consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -e|--exclude <EXCLUDE>                                   Do not consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -v|--verbosity <VERBOSITY>                               Sets the verbosity
                                                           level of the command.
                                                           Allowed values are
                                                           q[uiet], m[inimal],
                                                           n[ormal], d[etailed].
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Quiet, Q, Minimal, M,
                                                           Normal, N, Detailed,
                                                           D.
  --logdestination <LOG_DESTINATION>                       Destination for
                                                           logging.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --logfile <LOG_FILE>                                     Log to the named
                                                           file.
  --outputformat <OUTPUT_FORMAT>                           Format for output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Off, Text, Csv,
                                                           Metrics, LibYears.
  --outputdestination <OUTPUT_DESTINATION>                 Destination for
                                                           output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --outputfile <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>                          File name for output.
  --branchnametemplate <BRANCH_NAME_TEMPLATE>              Template used for
                                                           creating the branch
                                                           name.
  -git|--gitclipath <GIT_CLI_PATH>                         Path to git to use
                                                           instead of
                                                           lib2gitsharp
                                                           implementation

result.stdout:
Automagically update NuGet packages in .NET projects. 0.35.0

Usage: NuKeeper [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  global        Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all
                repositories the provided token can access.
  inspect       Checks projects existing locally for possible updates.
  org           Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all
                repositories in a github organisation or an Azure DevOps
                project.
  repo          Performs version checks and generates pull requests for a single
                repository.
  update        Applies relevant updates to a local project.

Run 'NuKeeper [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

Commands:

                repositories the provided token can access.

result.stdout:
Performs version checks and generates pull requests for a single repository.

Usage: NuKeeper repo [options] <Repository URI> <Token>

Arguments:
  Repository URI                                           The URI of the
                                                           repository to scan.
  Token                                                    Personal access token
                                                           to authorise access
                                                           to server.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                             Show help
                                                           information.
  --setautomerge                                           Set automatically
                                                           auto merge for
                                                           created pull request.
                                                           Works only for Azure
                                                           Devops. Defaults to
                                                           false.
  -t|--targetBranch <TARGET_BRANCH>                        Use another target
                                                           branch than the
                                                           currently active HEAD
                                                           branch of the remote
                                                           or local repository
  -cdir|--checkout-directory <CHECKOUT_DIRECTORY>          If you want NuKeeper
                                                           to check out the
                                                           repository to an
                                                           alternate path, set
                                                           it here (by default,
                                                           a temporary directory
                                                           is used).
  -f|--fork <FORK_MODE>                                    Prefer to make
                                                           branches on a fork of
                                                           the writer
                                                           repository, or on
                                                           that repository
                                                           itself. Allowed
                                                           values are
                                                           PreferFork,
                                                           PreferSingleRepository,
                                                           SingleRepositoryOnly.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           PreferFork,
                                                           PreferSingleRepository,
                                                           SingleRepositoryOnly.
  -m|--maxpackageupdates <MAX_PACKAGE_UPDATES>             The maximum number of
                                                           package updates to
                                                           apply on one
                                                           repository. Defaults
                                                           to 3.
  --maxopenpullrequests <MAX_OPEN_PULL_REQUESTS>           The maximum number of
                                                           open pull requests
                                                           for one repository.
                                                           Defaults to 1 if
                                                           `--consolidate` is
                                                           specified, otherwise
                                                           defaults to
                                                           `--maxpackageupdates`.
  -n|--consolidate                                         Consolidate updates
                                                           into a single pull
                                                           request. Defaults to
                                                           false.
  -l|--label <LABEL>                                       Label to apply to
                                                           GitHub pull requests.
                                                           Defaults to
                                                           'nukeeper'. Multiple
                                                           labels can be
                                                           provided by
                                                           specifying this
                                                           option multiple
                                                           times.
  -g|--api <API_ENDPOINT>                                  Api Base Url. If you
                                                           are using an internal
                                                           server and not a
                                                           public one, you must
                                                           set it to the api url
                                                           of your server.
  --platform <PLATFORM>                                    Sets the
                                                           collaboration
                                                           platform type. By
                                                           default this is
                                                           inferred from the
                                                           Url.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           GitHub, AzureDevOps,
                                                           Bitbucket,
                                                           BitbucketLocal,
                                                           GitLab, Gitea.
  -d|--deletebranchaftermerge <DELETE_BRANCH_AFTER_MERGE>  Deletes branch
                                                           created by NuKeeper
                                                           after merge. Defaults
                                                           to true.
  -c|--change <ALLOWED_CHANGE>                             Allowed version
                                                           change: Patch, Minor,
                                                           Major. Defaults to
                                                           Major.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           None, Patch, Minor,
                                                           Major.
  --useprerelease <USE_PRERELEASE>                         Allowed prerelease:
                                                           Always, Never,
                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Defaults to
                                                           FromPrerelease.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Always, Never,
                                                           FromPrerelease.
  -s|--source <SOURCE>                                     Specifies a NuGet
                                                           package source to use
                                                           during the operation.
                                                           This setting
                                                           overrides all of the
                                                           sources specified in
                                                           the NuGet.config
                                                           files. Multiple
                                                           sources can be
                                                           provided by
                                                           specifying this
                                                           option multiple
                                                           times.
  -a|--age <MINIMUM_PACKAGE_AGE>                           Exclude updates that
                                                           do not meet a minimum
                                                           age, in order to not
                                                           consume packages
                                                           immediately after
                                                           they are released.
                                                           Examples: 0 = zero,
                                                           12h = 12 hours, 3d =
                                                           3 days, 2w = two
                                                           weeks. The default is
                                                           7 days.
  -i|--include <INCLUDE>                                   Only consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -e|--exclude <EXCLUDE>                                   Do not consider
                                                           packages matching
                                                           this regex pattern.
  -v|--verbosity <VERBOSITY>                               Sets the verbosity
                                                           level of the command.
                                                           Allowed values are
                                                           q[uiet], m[inimal],
                                                           n[ormal], d[etailed].
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Quiet, Q, Minimal, M,
                                                           Normal, N, Detailed,
                                                           D.
  --logdestination <LOG_DESTINATION>                       Destination for
                                                           logging.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --logfile <LOG_FILE>                                     Log to the named
                                                           file.
  --outputformat <OUTPUT_FORMAT>                           Format for output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Off, Text, Csv,
                                                           Metrics, LibYears.
  --outputdestination <OUTPUT_DESTINATION>                 Destination for
                                                           output.
                                                           Allowed values are:
                                                           Console, File, Off.
  --outputfile <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>                          File name for output.
  --branchnametemplate <BRANCH_NAME_TEMPLATE>              Template used for
                                                           creating the branch
                                                           name.
  -git|--gitclipath <GIT_CLI_PATH>                         Path to git to use
                                                           instead of
                                                           lib2gitsharp
                                                           implementation

result.stdout:
Applies relevant updates to a local project.

Usage: NuKeeper update [options] <Path>

Arguments:
  Path                                          The path to a .sln or project
                                                file, or to a directory
                                                containing a .NET
                                                solution/project. If none is
                                                specified, the current directory
                                                will be used.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                  Show help information.
  -m|--maxpackageupdates <MAX_PACKAGE_UPDATES>  Maximum number of package
                                                updates to make. Defaults to 1.
  -c|--change <ALLOWED_CHANGE>                  Allowed version change: Patch,
                                                Minor, Major. Defaults to Major.
                                                Allowed values are: None, Patch,
                                                Minor, Major.
  --useprerelease <USE_PRERELEASE>              Allowed prerelease: Always,
                                                Never, FromPrerelease. Defaults
                                                to FromPrerelease.
                                                Allowed values are: Always,
                                                Never, FromPrerelease.
  -s|--source <SOURCE>                          Specifies a NuGet package source
                                                to use during the operation.
                                                This setting overrides all of
                                                the sources specified in the
                                                NuGet.config files. Multiple
                                                sources can be provided by
                                                specifying this option multiple
                                                times.
  -a|--age <MINIMUM_PACKAGE_AGE>                Exclude updates that do not meet
                                                a minimum age, in order to not
                                                consume packages immediately
                                                after they are released.
                                                Examples: 0 = zero, 12h = 12
                                                hours, 3d = 3 days, 2w = two
                                                weeks. The default is 7 days.
  -i|--include <INCLUDE>                        Only consider packages matching
                                                this regex pattern.
  -e|--exclude <EXCLUDE>                        Do not consider packages
                                                matching this regex pattern.
  -v|--verbosity <VERBOSITY>                    Sets the verbosity level of the
                                                command. Allowed values are
                                                q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal],
                                                d[etailed].
                                                Allowed values are: Quiet, Q,
                                                Minimal, M, Normal, N, Detailed,
                                                D.
  --logdestination <LOG_DESTINATION>            Destination for logging.
                                                Allowed values are: Console,
                                                File, Off.
  --logfile <LOG_FILE>                          Log to the named file.
  --outputformat <OUTPUT_FORMAT>                Format for output.
                                                Allowed values are: Off, Text,
                                                Csv, Metrics, LibYears.
  --outputdestination <OUTPUT_DESTINATION>      Destination for output.
                                                Allowed values are: Console,
                                                File, Off.
  --outputfile <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>               File name for output.
  --branchnametemplate <BRANCH_NAME_TEMPLATE>   Template used for creating the
                                                branch name.
  -git|--gitclipath <GIT_CLI_PATH>              Path to git to use instead of
                                                lib2gitsharp implementation
